programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: After marrying on Daufuskie Island, a family of eleven wants to find a place where it can visit, relax and enjoy the beach.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: A man from Vancouver, Canada, has planned to live on the beach since he was a teenager, and now searches for a place in Rio Hato, Panama.

programs.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: A single mom who worked multiple jobs now has enough money to buy the lake house she's dreamed of on Lake Kampeska, S.D.; she hopes to find a home with space for her and her kids where they can spend quality time together.

programs.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programs.sub_title: Boaters Seek a Bargain in North Carolina
programs.desc: Boat owners from New Jersey fall in love with Lake Norman, N.C., while visiting a friend during vacation; now, they're hunting for a lake house where they can use their boat and entertain friends and family.

programs.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: A Missouri couple with a long history of visiting Kentucky Lake, Ky., is determined to find a permanent retreat where they can indulge in the area's natural beauty; they bring their teen daughter along to help scope out what the area has to offer.

programs.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: A couple with two daughters currently lives in Lansing, N.Y.; they want to remain in the Cayuga Lake region, but they're looking for a more spacious home closer to the lake's lapping shores.
